user.title: Create a Remote Proxy
user.description: Give this remote a name and choose which button entities it should expose as commands.

data.name: Remote name
data.select_device: Add all buttons from a device (optional)

data_description.name: Shown as the entity name, e.g. Blu-ray Player
data_description.select_device: Selects every button entity on this device — all will be added as commands. Use this for LinknLink or MQTT devices. Leave blank to pick buttons individually below.
data_description.button_entities: Only used when no device is selected above

review.title: Review buttons
review.description: Remove any buttons you don't want on this remote, then click Submit.

names.title: Name the commands
names.description: Enter the command name for each button. These are the strings you pass to remote.send_command.

power.title: Power button bindings
power.description: Optionally choose which commands to send when the power toggle is pressed. Leave blank if your device has no separate power on/off commands.

error.no_entities: No button entities selected. Enable Select all or pick at least one button.

init.title: Edit button entities
init.description: Add or remove button entities from this remote.

data.select_device: Add all buttons from a device (optional)

data_description.select_device: Replaces all current buttons with every button entity on this device. Leave blank to pick individually below.
data_description.button_entities: Only used when no device is selected above

review.title: Review buttons
review.description: Remove any buttons you don't want on this remote, then click Submit.

names.title: Edit command names
names.description: Update the command name for each button.

power.title: Power button bindings
power.description: Optionally choose which commands to send when the power toggle is pressed.
